_comment: One model per purpose. Best model selected based on evaluation results.

churn_predictor.name: Customer Churn DNN
churn_predictor.purpose: Predict the probability that a customer will churn (not return). This is the selected best model for churn prediction.
churn_predictor.selection_reason: DNN outperformed Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, KNN and Logistic Regression in segment-level AUC on Champions and High-Value customer groups. Named 'best' in saved file.

features.name: recency
features.description: Number of days since the customer last placed an order (from snapshot date 2011-12-10). Lower = more recent = less likely to churn.

features.name: frequency
features.description: Total number of orders the customer has placed. Higher = more loyal.

features.name: monetary
features.description: Total revenue generated by the customer (SUM of price + freight_value). Higher = more valuable.

features.name: avg_basket_size
features.description: Average number of items per order for this customer.

features.name: product_variety
features.description: Number of distinct product categories the customer has purchased from.

features.name: avg_unit_price
features.description: Average price per unit item the customer pays.

features.name: r_score
features.description: Recency quintile score (1-5). Score 5 = most recent buyer.

features.name: f_score
features.description: Frequency quintile score (1-5). Score 5 = most frequent buyer.

features.name: m_score
features.description: Monetary quintile score (1-5). Score 5 = highest spender.

features.name: rfm_score
features.description: Combined RFM score = r_score + f_score + m_score. Range: 3-15.

known_weaknesses: Model struggles most with Champions segment (AUC 0.658 — borderline).
False Negatives: high-frequency buyers with moderate recency are often missed.
False Positives: recent 1-time buyers with no repeat history are over-flagged.

revenue_forecaster.name: Prophet Revenue Forecast
revenue_forecaster.purpose: Predict daily revenue for the next 30 days using historical time-series patterns.
revenue_forecaster.selection_reason: Prophet is the primary forecasting model. It captures weekly seasonality, yearly seasonality, UK holidays, and trend changepoints. The LSTM model exists but was not selected as primary because Prophet provides better interpretability for business use.

columns_used.y: Daily revenue = SUM(price + freight_value) from order_items joined with orders
